event_comments:
It takes a lot of people to run an event.
Thank you to all volunteers for helping make this event a success!
For corrections and updates, email epunch@cascadeoc.org.
cumulative_event_comments:
Want to talk about your results, discuss your routes, and learn some orienteering skills? Join Cascade’s post-race online group discussion called About the Route, from 8-9pm on the Sundays following Winter League events. Details here.
The event has been posted on the UsynligO app, https://usynligo.no/. Zoom in the map to Shoreview; it is the event that was posted Jan 9, 2022. (And check out the other three events at Shoreview Park / Shoreline College.)
It takes a lot of people to run an event.
For corrections and updates, email epunch@cascadeoc.org.
